3.28.0 Hotfix 9
3.28.0 Hotfix 9
Fixed a bug where level 20 Greater Multiple Projectiles, and Greater Volley could not be used with some vendor recipes.
Fixed a bug where the 'Sacrifice a rare corrupted map' Harvest Craft could not be used on the new maps.
Fixed an instance crash.
